history.reason: Phase 1 misframing erratum — upstream re-read showed for_prompt() is full pass-through; per-turn transformer (v1-v6) had no upstream basis. Phase 1 disabled in commit c1feb48a1 (compaction_phase1_enabled=0). Phase 2 decoupled and remains live. Compaction priority simplified in commit 39bc97786 (codex always tries server-side first). proposal/design/spec/tasks/handoff annotated with ERRATUM blocks; DD-1..DD-5 marked SUPERSEDED, DD-6 still true (flag exists default false), DD-7 architecturally still correct, DD-8..DD-13 (Phase 2) active.
